---
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: simple
        css: compro-style.css
        slide-number: c/t
        include-after-body: hide-logo.html
        chalkboard:
            buttons: true
            theme: whiteboard
        transition: slide
        background-transition: fade
        code-copy: true
        code-fold: true
        code-overflow: wrap
        smaller: false
        incremental: false
        preview-links: auto
        logo: "logo.png"
        footer: ""
        margin: 0.1
        fig-responsive: true
        highlight-style: github
        html-math-method: katex
---

# {#hero-slide .gradient-hero .smaller .hide-logo}

<div style="text-align: center; padding-top: 15vh;">

![](logo.png){width=450 style="margin-bottom: 40px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center; max-height: 120px;"}

<h2 style="font-size: 1.8em; color: #2563eb; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5em;">Indonesia's Next AI-Native ERP</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.2em; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 2em;">
Transforming Business Operations with Intelligent Automation
</p>

</div>

# Problem Statement {#section-problem}

## Enterprise ERP: Built for Giants {#problem-enterprise .full-width .smaller}

Today's enterprise resource planning systems are built for large corporations:

- Implementation costs ranging from tens to hundreds of millions of rupiah
- Complex interfaces requiring extensive training and dedicated IT expertise
- Deployment processes that take months or even years to complete
- Continuous maintenance demands a dedicated internal IT team
- Feature-heavy platforms where most capabilities go unused

## The SME Struggle {#problem-sme .full-width .smaller}

Without access to a proper ERP system, SMEs are forced to rely on:

- Manual spreadsheets prone to human error and data loss
- Fragmented data scattered across disconnected platforms
- Business decisions driven by intuition rather than data insights
- Paper-based processes that cannot scale with the business
- Limited visibility into operations and overall business performance

## The Cost of the Gap {#problem-gap .full-width .smaller}

This technology gap creates serious consequences:

- Valuable time wasted on repetitive administrative tasks
- Missed opportunities for growth and operational optimization
- Competitive disadvantage against data-driven competitors
- Inability to scale operations efficiently
- Higher operating costs due to manual inefficiencies

<div style="margin-top: 40px; padding: 20px; background: #eff6ff; border-left: 4px solid #2563eb; border-radius: 8px;">
<strong>The Gap:</strong> SMEs need enterprise-grade technology, but existing solutions are too expensive and complex.
</div>

# Solution {#section-solution}

## Omniflow — ERP for Everyone {#solution-intro .smaller}

Omniflow is built to bridge the gap that has long existed in the market:

- **Affordable** — no setup fee, monthly subscription, 30-day free trial
- **AI-Native** — intelligent automation built into every module, not an add-on
- **Easy to use** — intuitive interface, 2–4 week setup for small businesses
- **Modular** — 18 integrated modules, start with what you need and grow from there
- **Cloud-based** — access via web, iOS, and Android with 99.9% uptime SLA

<div style="margin-top: 30px; padding: 20px; background: #eff6ff; border-left: 4px solid #2563eb; border-radius: 8px;">
<strong>Omniflow's Mission:</strong> An integrated ERP solution for business transformation — trusted by 10,000+ businesses.
</div>

## How It Works {#solution-how .full-width .smaller}

1. **Sign Up & Choose Modules** — select modules that fit your business needs
2. **Import & Setup** — onboarding and system configuration within 2–4 weeks
3. **Run Your Business** — monitor operations and make data-driven decisions

# Key Features {#section-features}

## 18 Integrated Modules (1/3) {#features-modules .full-width .smaller}

- **HRIS** — recruitment, attendance, payroll, performance management
- **Accounting** — general ledger, invoicing, financial reports, multi-currency
- **Point of Sale** — offline/online cashier, real-time stock, multi-store
- **E-Commerce** — integrated online store, order and payment management
- **Inventory** — multi-location, real-time tracking, warehouse optimization
- **Sales Management** — visual pipeline, deal tracking, revenue forecasting

## 18 Integrated Modules (2/3) {#features-modules-2 .full-width .smaller}

- **Purchasing** — purchase orders, vendor management, automated RFQ
- **Payment Gateway** — Midtrans, Virtual Account, QRIS, e-wallet
- **XRM** — client relationship management, RBAC, 2FA, Redis caching
- **LMS** — learning and employee training management system
- **Telemarketing** — auto-dialer, TTS audio, outbound campaign management
- **Analytics** — integrated with BCA, OrderOnline, Majoo, Moka

## 18 Integrated Modules (3/3) {#features-modules-3 .full-width .smaller}

- **Asset Management** — asset tracking, depreciation, maintenance scheduling
- **URLs** — URL shortener, QR code, custom domain, click analytics
- **Bizzcard** — digital business card, NFC sharing, vCard export
- **Manufacturing** — BOM, work order, production planning, quality control
- **Supply Chain** — end-to-end supply chain management, multi-supplier
- **DMS** — document management, versioning, approval workflow

## AI & Technology {#features-ai .full-width .smaller}

Omniflow is built on modern technology and AI from the ground up:

- **AI-Powered** — intelligent automation, predictions, and analytics in every module
- **Redis Caching** — high performance, sub-millisecond response times
- **Job Queue (RabbitMQ)** — asynchronous job processing, circuit breaker pattern
- **Mobile Native** — Flutter app for iOS and Android
- **50+ Integrations** — Odoo, SAP, Salesforce, Shopify, WooCommerce, and more
- **Zapier** — connects to 5,000+ third-party applications
- **API-First** — RESTful API for custom integration with any system

# Benefits {#section-benefits}

## Measurable Impact {#benefits-impact .full-width .smaller}

Real numbers from Omniflow users:

- **90%** reduction in software complexity — one platform, not many systems
- **3x** faster decision-making with real-time analytics
- **60%** productivity increase through routine task automation
- **40%** average reduction in operational costs
- **15 hrs/week** saved from HR administration automation
- **35%** savings in HR operational costs

## Platform Advantages {#benefits-platform .full-width .smaller}

What sets Omniflow apart from other solutions:

- **All-in-One** — integrate all business processes into a single platform
- **Scalable** — supports 100K+ users, grows alongside your business
- **Secure** — ISO 27001 certified, enterprise encryption, multi-factor authentication
- **Reliable** — 99.9% uptime SLA, redundant infrastructure
- **24/7 Support** — technical assistance, dedicated account manager, certified training
- **Multi-language** — Indonesian, English, and Mandarin

<div style="margin-top: 30px; padding: 20px; background: #eff6ff; border-left: 4px solid #2563eb; border-radius: 8px;">
<strong>30-day free trial</strong> — no setup fee, no commitment.
</div>

# Use Cases {#section-use-cases}

## Industries We Serve {#use-cases-industry .full-width .smaller}

- **Manufacturing** — BOM, production, quality control, supply chain
- **Retail & E-Commerce** — multi-store PoS, inventory, marketplace integration
- **F&B & Culinary** — raw material management, recipes, offline cashier
- **Distribution & Trading** — purchase orders, multi-warehouse, vendor management
- **Services & Consulting** — CRM, project management, client invoicing
- **Education** — LMS, participant management, progress tracking
- **Hospital & Healthcare** — medical records, billing, staff management
- **Supply Chain & Logistics** — shipping, tracking, fleet management
- **Property & Construction** — project, asset, and contract management

## Business Scale {#use-cases-scale .full-width .smaller}

Omniflow is designed for companies of all sizes:

- **1–10 employees** — starter modules, quick setup, affordable pricing
- **11–50 employees** — full modules, multi-user, management reports
- **51–200 employees** — custom workflows, advanced integrations, dedicated support
- **201–1000+ employees** — enterprise solution, custom SLA, full implementation

# Technology {#section-technology}

## Tech Stack & Infrastructure {#technology-stack .full-width .smaller}

Omniflow is built on a reliable modern technology foundation:

- **Cloud Infrastructure** — 99.9% uptime SLA, redundant infrastructure
- **Architecture** — microservices with Redis caching and RabbitMQ job queue
- **Mobile** — native Flutter app for iOS and Android
- **Security** — ISO 27001, AES-256 encryption, MFA, complete audit trail
- **Compliance** — GDPR, ISO 27001, PCI DSS
- **API** — RESTful API, API-first approach for seamless integration

## 50+ Ready-to-Use Integrations {#technology-integrations .full-width .smaller}

Omniflow connects with the global and local business ecosystem:

- **ERP** — Odoo, SAP
- **CRM** — Salesforce
- **E-Commerce** — Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento
- **Accounting** — Microsoft Dynamics, QuickBooks, Xero
- **Payments** — Midtrans (VA, QRIS, Credit Card, E-Wallet)
- **Local Analytics** — BCA, OrderOnline, Majoo, Moka
- **Collaboration** — Slack, Zoom
- **Automation** — Zapier (connects to 5,000+ applications)

# Competitive Advantage {#section-competitive}

## Omniflow vs The Alternatives {#competitive-table .full-width .smaller}

|  | **Omniflow** | Enterprise ERP | Spreadsheet |
|--|:--:|:--:|:--:|
| Setup | 2–4 weeks | 2–3 months | Minutes |
| Modules | 18 integrated | Limited | None |
| AI Built-in | Yes | Rarely | No |
| ISO 27001 | Yes | Yes | No |
| Multi-language | ID / EN / ZH | Rarely | Limited |
| Mobile App | iOS & Android | Rarely | No |
| 50+ Integrations | Yes | Partial | No |

## Competitive Strengths {#competitive-advantages .full-width .smaller}

What makes Omniflow different from all alternatives:

- **Local & contextual** — designed for Indonesian business regulations and practices
- **18 modules in one platform** — 90% reduction in software complexity
- **AI from day one** — not a bolt-on feature, embedded throughout every workflow
- **Fast implementation** — 2–4 weeks for small businesses, not months
- **24/7 support** — certified expert team ready to help at any time

# Roadmap {#section-roadmap}

## Roadmap: Available Now {#roadmap-now .full-width .smaller}

Features and modules available to use today:

- 18 integrated modules (HRIS, Accounting, PoS, E-Commerce, and more)
- 50+ global and local platform integrations
- Mobile app for iOS & Android, multi-language (ID/EN/ZH)

## Roadmap: Coming Soon {#roadmap-soon .full-width .smaller}

Features currently in active development:

- More advanced Manufacturing & Supply Chain modules
- More precise AI demand forecasting
- Expanded Indonesian marketplace integrations (Tokopedia, Shopee)

## Roadmap: Long-Term Vision {#roadmap-vision .full-width .smaller}

Omniflow's strategic direction ahead:

- Third-party module marketplace
- Expansion into Southeast Asian markets
- Integrated digital business ecosystem for Indonesian SMEs

# Pricing {#section-pricing}

## Plans & Pricing {#pricing-plans .full-width .smaller}

Transparent pricing, no hidden fees:

| Feature | **Starter** | **Growth** | **Enterprise** |
|--|:--:|:--:|:--:|
| Employees | 1–10 | 11–50 | 51–1000+ |
| Modules | Core selection | All modules | All + Custom |
| Mobile App | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Integrations | Standard | 50+ | Custom API |
| Support | Email | 24/7 Chat | Dedicated Manager |
| Onboarding | Self-serve | Guided | White-glove |
| Implementation | Self-managed | 2–4 weeks | 2–3 months |

<div style="margin-top: 30px; padding: 20px; background: #eff6ff; border-left: 4px solid #2563eb; border-radius: 8px;">
<strong>30-day free trial</strong> — no setup fee, no credit card required.
</div>

# Contact {#section-contact}

## Get Started {#contact-cta .full-width .smaller}

- **Free demo** — see Omniflow in action for your business
- **Consultation** — we'll help you design the right solution
- **30-day trial** — no risk, no setup fee

## Contact Us {#contact-info .full-width .smaller}

- Website: [omniflow.id](https://omniflow.id)
- Email: contact@omniflow.id
- Phone: +62 821 2560 9413
- Address: Jl. Letjen S. Parman No. 28, Grogol Petamburan, West Jakarta 11470
- Office hours: Monday–Friday, 08:00–18:00 WIB
